scrapedName: Northeast Vietnam: Ba Be Lake & Ban Gioc Waterfall 5 days

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Ba Be Lake Transfer
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 08:30, your journey starts from Hanoi. To transport to Ba Be Lake, there will be a private driver for you. En route, when the city disappears,  a mesmerizing location celebrated for its unspoiled charm, vibrant emerald waters, majestic limestone peaks, and lush green forests begins to come into sight. After a moving morning, we get to Bac Kan town and rejuvenate with an early lunch featuring local dishes there. Afternoon

In the afternoon, we will head to Ba Be Lake

itinerary.title: Ba Be Lake Boat - Dau Dang - Trekking
itinerary.description:
Morning

Prepare for a day filled with thrilling activities by indulging in a hearty breakfast at the homestay. Subsequently, embark on a private boat tour to explore the serene Ba Be Lake, the largest freshwater lake in North Vietnam. Be captivated by the breathtaking scenery and the lush natural surroundings that grace this expansive lake. Pause at Dau Dang Waterfall for a refreshing picnic in the woods, providing the necessary energy for the afternoon trek. Afternoon

Kick off a trekking route to the remote Dzao Village in town

itinerary.title: Ba Be - Cao Bang Ethnic Communities
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy a delightful breakfast, then embark on a journey to Cao Bang Province, where you can encounter diverse communities such as the Nung, H'mong, and Tho people. Replenish your energy with lunch at a nearby restaurant in Cao Bang before completing the hotel check-in process. Afternoon

Dedicate approximately two hours to exploring the lifestyles of local residents in a traditional village within Cao Bang City.

itinerary.title: Cao Bang - Ban Gioc - Nguom Ngao
itinerary.description:
Morning

Discover the awe-inspiring Ban Gioc Waterfall, renowned as one of the most breathtaking natural wonders in North Vietnam. Capture lasting memories of Vietnam's most majestic and stunning waterfall with captivating photographs. Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant following the morning exploration. Afternoon

Explore the enchanting Nguom Ngao Cave, a natural marvel that promises to be a truly worthwhile experience. Marvel at the remarkable stalactites in various formations, as well as the captivating scenery accompanied by the unique sounds of wind and water echoing through the rocks

itinerary.title: Cao Bang - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Commence your day with a delightful breakfast at the homestay, settle the bill, and complete the check-out process. Subsequently, our private driver will be at your service, ensuring your transfer back to Hanoi. En route, a break will be made for a delectable local lunch experience. Afternoon

Arrival at your hotel in Hanoi. NOTE: Kindly note that the accommodation in Hanoi is not covered as part of this tour.

highlights: Experience an escape at the awe-inspiring natural vistas of Ba Be Lake, a concealed treasure nestled in Northeast Vietnam
Immerse yourself in the traditional way of life by staying with a hospitable homestay family, relishing authentic Vietnamese dishes
Marvel at the grandeur of the Ban Gioc Waterfall, recognized as one of Southeast Asia's largest and most breathtaking waterfalls
Embark on scenic treks through charming landscapes and villages, providing a unique glimpse into the local way of life
included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except home-stay.
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
